name: Ryan Baumann
role: Developer Experience and Forward Deployed Engineering leader
tagline: DEVX · FORWARD DEPLOYED ENGINEERING · AI-NATIVE PLATFORMS
heroHeadline: I build the teams and systems that make developer platforms grow.
intro: I lead Developer Experience and forward-deployed engineering from field signal to shipped product: context, tools, evals, distribution, and the teams behind them.
headline: Developer experience is a growth system. AI makes it a product surface.
description: Ryan Baumann leads Developer Experience and Forward Deployed Engineering for AI-native platforms, turning field signal into tools, evals, distribution, and growth.
categoryDefinition: AI Developer Experience is the product, context, evals, and distribution system that lets developers and their agents succeed with a platform.
aboutTeaser: I lead a 20+ person Developer Experience Engineering organization at Google Maps Platform. We turn repeated field friction into products, context, evals, and distribution that help developers and their agents succeed.

sectionIntros.work: The operating system behind AI Developer Experience: find the signal, ship the tool, evaluate the experience, distribute it into the workflow, and measure growth.
sectionIntros.writing: Field notes on Developer Experience, forward-deployed engineering, evals, and building platforms for developers and their agents.
sectionIntros.talks: Demo-first talks about what shipped, how the team built it, and why it matters for developer platforms.
sectionIntros.demos: Working maps that keep me close to the developer experience: real APIs, real constraints, and the architecture choices behind them.

positioning: Developer Experience, Forward Deployed Engineering, and AI-native platforms.
answerEngineSummary: Ryan Baumann leads Developer Experience and Forward Deployed Engineering for Google Maps Platform. He leads a 20+ person organization that turns field signal into products, context, evals, distribution, and measurable platform growth.
